name: WhatsApp Skill
description: Open WhatsApp chats, send messages by contact name or international phone number, and search inside conversations. Direct wa.me sends require a country code; if it is missing, ask which country the number belongs to and retry with the country calling code.

toolDeclarations.name: open_whatsapp_chat
toolDeclarations.description: Open a WhatsApp chat by contact name or international phone number. For wa.me links, the number must include a country code. If the number is local, ask which country it belongs to and resolve the calling code before opening.

contactName.description: The contact name as it appears in WhatsApp. Use this when no phone number is known.

phoneNumber.description: International phone number for wa.me. Include the country code; local numbers will not work.

countryCode.description: Optional country calling code for local numbers, like +44 or 44. Use this after asking the user which country the number is from.

prefillMessage.description: Optional text to prefill when opening by phone number.

toolDeclarations.name: send_whatsapp_message
toolDeclarations.description: Send a WhatsApp message to a contact. Prefer phoneNumber when available because it uses WhatsApp's direct wa.me flow, and that flow requires an international number with country code. If the number is local, ask which country it belongs to, resolve the country calling code, and retry using countryCode or a full international number.

contactName.description: The name of the contact as it appears in WhatsApp

phoneNumber.description: International phone number for wa.me. Must include the country code, for example +15551234567.

countryCode.description: Optional country calling code for local numbers, like +1 or 1. Ask the user which country the number belongs to if this is missing.

delaySeconds.description: Optional delay before sending, in seconds.

delayMs.description: Optional delay before sending, in milliseconds.

autonomous.description: If true, the AI will automatically tap the send button. Only use this if the user has explicitly given permission or enabled global autonomy.

toolDeclarations.name: search_whatsapp_chat
toolDeclarations.description: Open a WhatsApp chat and search within that conversation.

contactName.description: The contact name as it appears in WhatsApp.

phoneNumber.description: International phone number for wa.me, including the country code.

countryCode.description: Optional country calling code for local numbers. Ask the user which country the number belongs to if the number does not already include one.

query.description: Text to search for inside the chat.
